reasoning: The control SC-5(1) focuses on restricting the ability to launch denial-of-service attacks on other systems. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict egress traffic, ensuring that Pods cannot communicate freely with external systems. Additionally, configuring Pod security contexts to restrict network capabilities can prevent Pods from using network features that could be exploited for attacks. Admission controllers can be used to deny Pods that attempt to use privileged ports or capabilities that could facilitate such attacks.
title: Denial-Of-Service Protection - Denial - of - service protection | restrict ability to attack other systems rest
